title: Code, Quotation, and Imagery in Body Text (code-blocks-and-images diagnostic)
purpose: Diagnostic for three structural elements: verbatim source-code block, blockquote, and figure with caption and cross-reference. Tests preservation of code semantics (Python binary search), quotation framing (Knuth on premature optimization), and image embedding with figure-numbered captions. Source uses topical, leak-free section titles and content-bearing prose that frames each element without describing its structural form.

blockquote.content: Premature optimization is the root of all evil. We should forget about small efficiencies, say about ninety-seven percent of the time.

figure.image_size: 400x300 PNG bar chart with 5 vertical bars
figure.caption: A sample bar chart with five vertical bars.
figure.label: fig:chart

structure.glossary_anchor: Section 4 lists function name, operators, return value, author, quotation phrase, and figure description in plain prose

ground_truth_basis: source.tex (deterministic) + visual spot-check of source.pdf (verified 2026-04-22). chart.png is a synthesized 400x300 PNG (5-bar vertical chart) generated by Pillow; included as the image asset.

files.probes.json: 10 probes: 3 paired content/format (code, quote, image) + caption + cross-ref + numeric-detail + 2 hallucination
